todos.description: Define priming domain contracts and source labels for generator + TUI state (AC-002, AC-003).
Add DB migration for priming_cache and priming_logs tables with fields needed for TTL and outcome logging (AC-006, AC-009).
Implement storage methods for cache read/write with 24h freshness checks and priming log inserts (AC-006, AC-009).
Implement personalized source adapter from latest clustering output with graceful skip when unavailable (AC-004).
Implement Reddit adapter for r/LucidDreaming with text-rich filtering and defensive parsing (AC-005).
Wire Reddit cache-first behavior: use fresh cache before fetch, persist fetched posts on miss (AC-006).
Implement AI adapter with required env validation and one retry via AI_MODEL_FALLBACK (AC-007, AC-008).
Implement static template source as deterministic terminal fallback (AC-003, AC-011).
Implement strict fallback orchestrator sequence Personalized -> Community -> AI Generated -> Template (AC-003).
Emit observability events for attempts, transitions, cache hit/miss, and terminal failures; persist display outcomes (AC-009, AC-010).
Integrate night priming TUI flow: p to open, n for next content, esc to exit with prior list selection intact (AC-001, AC-002, AC-011).
Add table-driven unit tests for source behavior, fallback matrix, and AI config validation paths (AC-003, AC-004, AC-007, AC-008, AC-012).
Add integration tests for cache TTL reuse, cache-hit network bypass, degraded-mode continuity, and logging/event side effects (AC-006, AC-009, AC-010, AC-011, AC-012).
